# Mark Siazon

> Product designer, full-stack developer, product engineer, UI/UX designer, and front-end specialist. Builds case-study-backed work across AI, mobile, Web3, and client web - portfolio at marksiazon.dev, GitHub profile @Iron-Mark.

> **Source map:** [llms-index.json](llms-index.json) (structured) - [llms-ctx-full.txt](public/llms-ctx-full.txt) (expanded) - [FAQ.md](public/FAQ.md) (Q&A) - [llms-index.schema.json](public/schema/llms-index.schema.json) (contract) - [person.jsonld](public/schema/person.jsonld) / [faq.jsonld](public/schema/faq.jsonld) (Schema.org)

Mark Siazon ships end-to-end: research and UX flows -> design systems -> React/Next.js/Flutter/Kotlin -> APIs and Web3 proofs -> deployment and verification. Based in the Philippines. Open to product design, full-stack, AI workflow, mobile, and Web3 proof work.

## Canonical sources

- Portfolio (primary): https://www.marksiazon.dev
- Person entity @id: https://www.marksiazon.dev/#person

- Secondary GitHub: https://github.com/mark-siazon

- Humans: https://github.com/Iron-Mark/Iron-Mark/blob/main/humans.txt

## Availability

- Open to: product design - full-stack engineering - AI workflow prototypes - mobile/Wear OS UX - Web3 systems
- Engagement: contract or full-time - Philippines & remote

## Featured work (case studies)

- HireProof - AI trust & safety for job seekers: https://www.marksiazon.dev/projects/hireproof
- Stellaroid Earn - Web3 credential proof on Stellar: https://www.marksiazon.dev/projects/stellaroid-earn
- ResQLink - Offline-first emergency response platform: https://www.marksiazon.dev/projects/resqlink
- LexInsights - AI legal compliance chat: https://www.marksiazon.dev/projects/lexinsights - Live: https://lexiph.vercel.app
- Good To Live - Client podcast web launch and feed setup: https://www.marksiazon.dev/projects/good-to-live
- FlowFit - Wear OS health & sensor companion: https://www.marksiazon.dev/projects/flowfit
- PalengkePay - Stellar fintech PWA for wet markets: https://www.marksiazon.dev/projects/palengkepay
- GawainYah - MiniPay AI utility with payment guardrails: https://www.marksiazon.dev/projects/gawainyah
- BaybayInscribe - Baybayin ML & cultural education UX: https://www.marksiazon.dev/projects/baybayinscribe - Model: https://huggingface.co/gilas/baybayinscribe

## Hackathon & lab (GitHub profile)

- qwen-ui-lab - AI-assisted UI scaffolding (Qwen3-VL, React, Tailwind, Next.js): https://www.marksiazon.dev/projects/qwen-ui-lab - Repo: https://github.com/Iron-Mark/qwen-ui-lab - Live: https://qwen-ui-lab.vercel.app
- Smart Profile (AI credentials SaaS): https://github.com/Iron-Mark/Hackathon-Smart-Profile-Management-System
- Kudlit (Flutter Baybayin learning, Android release): https://www.marksiazon.dev/projects/kudlit
- Pulse (Wear OS, GPS, heart-rate telemetry): https://www.marksiazon.dev/projects/pulse
